question.description: Question text shown to the user. You must only put exactly ONE question here.

suggestions.description: Optional choice suggestions. Omit this field when you want a freeform-only answer. If you provide >1 suggestions, provide recommended_option_index. Strive to give users the best, sensible options possible, following best-practices, guidelines, and common sense.

recommended_option_index.description: Optional 1-based index of the recommended suggestion.
